creator: areilly@bigpond.net.au
text:
On Tue, Dec 22, 2009 at 10:42:03AM -0800, Martin Holmes wrote:
> I installed squeezeboxserver from fresh ports on fbsd 7.2 this morning 
> 12/22/09 and have this same error.

I've just checked: my system is still running with the patch
that I described in the ports/1411025 trail.  This indicates to
me that neither the perl nor the squeezeboxserver ports have
been updated to correct this problem.  So just go with any of
the suggested hacks, for now.

Cheers,

-- 
Andrew
